footer.tagline: Wholesale beverage distributor in Bera since 1949. Weekly delivery to the hospitality and retail trade of Bortziriak, Malerreka and Baztán.

home.seoTitle: Beverage Distributor in Bera (Navarre) since 1949 | Manuel Taberna Edariak
home.seoDesc: Wholesale beverage distributor in Bera, Navarre. Weekly delivery to bars, restaurants and shops in Bortziriak, Malerreka and Baztán. Wines, beers, soft drinks and more since 1949.
home.seoKeywords: beverage distributor Navarre, beverage wholesaler Bera, hospitality drinks delivery, Manuel Taberna Edariak, wine distributor Bortziriak, drinks Baztán Malerreka
home.ogTitle: Beverage Distributor in Bera (Navarre) since 1949 | Manuel Taberna Edariak
home.ogDesc: Weekly beverage delivery to the hospitality trade of Bortziriak, Malerreka and Baztán. 18 product families and official brands.
home.twTitle: Manuel Taberna Edariak — Beverage distributor in Bera (Navarre)
home.twDesc: Weekly delivery to the hospitality trade of Bortziriak, Malerreka and Baztán since 1949.
home.heroLead: Wholesale beverage distributor for the hospitality and retail trade. Every week we visit and deliver to every town in Bortziriak, Malerreka and Baztán.
home.brandsTitle: We are official distributors of these brands
home.catTitle: A catalogue made for the hospitality trade
home.aboutTitle: Three quarters of a century serving the region
home.aboutLead: Manuel Taberna S.L. is a family business from Bera devoted to wholesale beverage distribution since 1949. We know every bar, every restaurant and every shop in the area, because we have been coming through their doors for generations.
home.aboutLi1: Weekly visit and delivery to every town in Bortziriak, Malerreka and Baztán.
home.aboutLi2: Direct service at the Agerra warehouse in Bera: come whenever you need to, the doors are open.
home.aboutLi3: Official distributors of Heineken, Schweppes, Insalus, Lacturale, Zapiain, Codorníu, Pago and Ur Daira.
home.serviceTitle: This is how we work with you
home.serviceLead: Our drivers travel the whole region delivering products to your bar, restaurant or shop. You take care of your customers; we take care of the rest.
home.service1Text: Every week we pass through all the towns in the area. Your order always arrives on the right day, with nothing for you to worry about.
home.service2Text: We officially distribute the brands your customers ask for: Heineken, Schweppes, Insalus, Lacturale, Zapiain, Codorníu, Pago and Ur Daira.
home.service3Text: Need something between deliveries? Drop by the Agerra warehouse, Monday to Friday from 08:00 to 15:00. The doors are open.
home.zoneTitle: Wherever you are, we get there
home.zoneLead: Weekly delivery to every town in these three districts of northern Navarre.
home.zone1Text: Bera, Lesaka, Etxalar, Arantza and Igantzi. Our home: the warehouse is here and it all began here in 1949.
home.zone2Text: Doneztebe/Santesteban and every town in the valley. Weekly visits to bars, societies and shops.
home.zone3Text: Elizondo and the whole Baztán valley, from Oronoz to Amaiur. Reliable delivery every week, including in high season.
home.faq1Q: Which areas do you deliver to?
home.faq1A: Every week we visit and deliver to all the towns in Bortziriak (Bera, Lesaka, Etxalar, Arantza and Igantzi), Malerreka and the Baztán valley.
home.faq2A: All kinds of alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverages — wines, beers, whiskies, liqueurs, soft drinks, cavas, cider and txakoli — plus coffee, milk, water, oil, preserves, juices, glassware and miniatures. 18 product families in total.
home.faq3Q: Can I buy directly at the warehouse?
home.faq3A: Yes. We are at Bidasoa karrika 76, in Bera, Monday to Friday from 08:00 to 15:00. Whatever you need, the doors are open.
home.faq4Q: How do I place an order?
home.faq4A: Call us on {tel1Link} or {tel2Link}, email us at {emailLink}, or tell your driver during the weekly visit.
home.ctaTitle: Your next order is one call away
home.ctaLead: Whatever questions you have, we are here to help. Call and we will take care of you.

catCommon.listLead: These are our regular references. If you're after something that isn't listed, call us: we'll get it.

catIndex.seoTitle: Beverage Catalogue for the Hospitality Trade | Manuel Taberna Edariak
catIndex.seoDesc: Wholesale beverage catalogue for bars, restaurants and shops: wines, beers, soft drinks, liqueurs, coffees, waters and more. 18 product families with weekly delivery in Bortziriak, Malerreka and Baztán (Navarre).
catIndex.seoKeywords: beverage catalogue hospitality, beverage wholesaler Navarre, wine beer soft drink distributor, supplier for bars Bera, Manuel Taberna Edariak
catIndex.ogTitle: Beverage Catalogue for the Hospitality Trade | Manuel Taberna Edariak
catIndex.ogDesc: 18 product families for your bar, restaurant or shop: wines, beers, soft drinks, liqueurs and much more. Weekly delivery in northern Navarre.
catIndex.heroLead: Everything your bar, restaurant or shop needs, gathered into 18 product families. Choose yours and discover the references we deliver every week across the whole region.
catIndex.title: 18 product families
catIndex.lead: From the cellar to the coffee machine: we work with every family the hospitality trade moves, with official brands and time-honoured references.
catIndex.ctaTitle: Can't find a reference? We'll get it
catIndex.ctaLead: Tell us what you need for your menu or your shop and we'll find it. Since 1949 we've been getting whatever the local hospitality trade asks for.

empresa.seoTitle: Company — Beverage Distributor in Bera since 1949 | Manuel Taberna Edariak
empresa.seoDesc: Manuel Taberna S.L. is a family business from Bera (Navarre) devoted to wholesale beverage distribution since 1949. A team of around 10 people and weekly delivery in Bortziriak, Malerreka and Baztán.
empresa.seoKeywords: beverage distribution company Navarre, Manuel Taberna history, beverage wholesaler Bera since 1949, family distributor Bortziriak
empresa.ogTitle: Company — Beverage Distributor in Bera since 1949 | Manuel Taberna Edariak
empresa.ogDesc: Family business from Bera with more than 75 years distributing beverages to the hospitality and retail trade of northern Navarre.
empresa.heroLead: More than 75 years serving the region. Since 1949, the drinks for the bars, restaurants and shops of Bortziriak, Malerreka and Baztán have left our warehouse in Bera.
empresa.historyTitle: From 1949 to today, never letting go of the wheel
empresa.historyP1: Manuel Taberna began delivering drinks across the region in 1949, when orders were written down by hand and the roads were different. In 1988 the business was incorporated as Manuel Taberna S.L., but the essence hasn't changed: a family business from Bera that knows every customer by name.
empresa.historyP2: Today we are a team of around ten people still doing the same as back then, only with more product families, more official brands and the same drive: that your business never runs short of anything.
empresa.clientsLead: We work for those who feed and serve drinks to the region. If your business serves a coffee, a pintxo or a full table, we are your supplier.
empresa.clientsLi1: Bars and cafés — from the midday draught to the morning coffee.
empresa.clientsLi2: Restaurants — wine list, waters, coffees and everything that crosses the table.
empresa.clientsLi3: Gastronomic societies — the pantry always full for dinners and celebrations.
empresa.clientsLi4: Shops and retailers — weekly restocking without leaving the counter.
empresa.warehouseEyebrow: Warehouse and delivery · Biltegia eta banaketa
empresa.warehouseTitle: From Agerra to your door, every week
empresa.warehouseP1: Our drivers travel the whole region taking our products to your bars, restaurants and shops. Even so, you can also come and see us if you need anything: the doors are open.
empresa.warehouseP2: The warehouse is in the Agerra neighbourhood of Bera, open Monday to Friday from 08:00 to 15:00. From there the weekly delivery sets out to every town in Bortziriak —Bera, Lesaka, Etxalar, Arantza and Igantzi—, Malerreka and the Baztán valley.
empresa.valuesLead: The vans are different and the catalogue has grown, but the way we work is the same as ever.
empresa.value1Text: We're from here and we work here. We know every bar, every shop and every society in the region, and you can call us or drop by whenever you like.
empresa.value2Text: Three generations of hospitality professionals have worked with us. Trust is earned order by order, and we've been earning it for more than 75 years.
empresa.value3Text: Every week we pass through your town, rain or shine. Your order arrives on the right day, and if something unexpected comes up, the warehouse is open every morning.
empresa.ctaTitle: Shall we talk about your business?
empresa.ctaLead: Tell us what you need and we'll prepare the delivery. One call is enough to get started.

contacto.seoTitle: Contact — Orders and Service in Bera (Navarre) | Manuel Taberna Edariak
contacto.seoDesc: Call us on 948 631 027 or email info@tabernaedariak.eus. Warehouse at Bidasoa karrika 76, Bera (Navarre), open Monday to Friday from 08:00 to 15:00. Orders and service for the hospitality and retail trade.
contacto.seoKeywords: contact beverage distributor Bera, hospitality drinks orders Navarre, Manuel Taberna Edariak phone, beverage warehouse Bortziriak
contacto.ogTitle: Contact — Orders and Service in Bera (Navarre) | Manuel Taberna Edariak
contacto.ogDesc: Whatever questions you have, we're ready to help. Phone, email, address and opening hours of the Bera warehouse.
contacto.heroLead: Whatever questions you have, we're ready to help. Call and we'll help you!
contacto.heroBasque: Edozer zalantza duzula, laguntzeko prest gaude. Deitu eta lagunduko dizugu!
contacto.eyebrow: Where and how · Non eta nola
contacto.title: Every way to reach us
contacto.lead: By phone, in writing or in person: choose whatever suits you best. The warehouse doors are open.
contacto.mapTitle: Map of Manuel Taberna Edariak's location in Bera
contacto.ctaLead: Monday to Friday, from 08:00 to 15:00, there's someone at the other end of the line.
